overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing first-person driving through a neon-lit futuristic city at dusk, transitioning to third-person exploration on foot around a parked vehicle and through a crowded waterfront plaza with wet pavement and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass and commercial street

events.description: exits covered highway underpass into open plaza area with visible sky and palm trees
vehicle slows down and comes to a complete stop in parking area

agents.ego_description: navigating a futuristic vehicle through neon-lit urban streets, passing under concrete overpasses and approaching a waterfront plaza

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving in parallel lane alongside ego vehicle

entered.detail: futuristic car dashboard with red ambient lighting and holographic displays
massive concrete highway overpass with support pillars
large illuminated advertisements with red and cyan neon lighting
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dusk sky in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment shows first-person driving from inside a futuristic vehicle with a red-lit dashboard, traveling under concrete highway overpasses through a cyberpunk city. Neon billboards illuminate the right side while the vehicle approaches an open plaza area with palm trees visible ahead, eventually slowing to a stop.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking plaza beneath highway overpass

events.description: camera perspective switches from first-person interior to third-person exterior view behind the vehicle
character interacts with vehicle by opening the rear trunk to reveal the engine bay

agents.ego_description: exiting the vehicle and walking a full 360-degree orbit around the parked car, inspecting its exterior details and opening the trunk

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket walking past the vehicle on the sidewalk

entered.detail: matte black vintage-futuristic sedan with yellow side stripes, chrome rims, and quad exhaust pipes
small food vendor stall with bright purple neon lighting
large paved open area with geometric tile patterns and yellow parking lines

segments.scene_description: After parking, the perspective shifts to third-person as the character exits the black retro-futuristic sedan and walks completely around it, showcasing the vehicle's custom details including yellow stripes and quad exhausts. The character opens the trunk to reveal the engine bay, all while standing in a concrete plaza beneath a highway overpass with neon-lit stalls nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront pedestrian promenade with palm trees

events.description: character walks away from the vehicle and enters the main pedestrian plaza
descending steps into a lower plaza area with a skate park depression and reflective wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking through a crowded waterfront plaza at dusk, passing pedestrians and approaching the water's edge with palm trees lining the path

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking directly toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: rain-slicked concrete tiles reflecting the neon lights and dusk sky
row of tall palm trees silhouetted against the blue-hour sky
sunken concrete skate park area with ramps in the center of the plaza
dark ocean water visible beyond the palm trees and plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the parked car into a spacious waterfront plaza with wet pavement reflecting the surrounding neon lights. Palm trees line the left side as pedestrians walk in various directions. The camera approaches a sunken skate park area with the dark ocean visible in the distance under a cloudy dusk sky, creating a moody cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from the interior of a speeding vehicle through a neon-lit city to a moody, pedestrian-filled waterfront plaza. It begins from a first-person perspective behind a red-lit dashboard, gliding under concrete highway overpasses and past glowing billboards before slowing to a stop in an open area. As the vehicle parks, the perspective shifts to third-person, circling a black retro-futuristic sedan with yellow stripes to reveal its engine bay amidst a plaza of neon-lit stalls. The camera then follows the character as they walk away from the car, transitioning onto wet pavement that reflects the vibrant city lights. Finally, the scene expands across a spacious waterfront lined with palm trees, moving past pedestrians toward a sunken skate park with the dark ocean visible under a cloudy dusk sky.
